entities.name: write stream
entities.context: Concept related to writing data to files

entities.name: Buffer
entities.context: Refers to memory storage used when writing data

entities.name: error event
entities.context: Event emitted when write stream reaches exclusive upper bound

entities.name: ETOOBIG
entities.context: Error code indicating an overflow situation

relationships.context: V uses write stream for writing data
V uses Buffer for handling data
V mentions error event in the context of file writing
V knows about the ETOOBIG error code
